properties.displayName: Enforce PostgreSQL Single Server 'Allow access to Azure services' is disabled
properties.description: Ensure 'Allow access to Azure services' is disabled for Azure PostgreSQL Single Server Access
nonComplianceMessages: PostgreSQL single server connection security settings do not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: 'Allow access to Azure services' must be disabled for PostgreSQL single servers. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
